description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to any branch or tag matching [0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+ and on pull requests to any branch. The workflow has a concurrency group based on the GitHub reference and cancels in-progress jobs. It defines four jobs: build-windows, build-macos, build-linux, and deploy. The build jobs use premake5 to generate project files and build binaries for different architectures and configurations. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the build jobs, and creates a release with the built binaries when a tag is pushed to the prod or dev branch.
